title: Auditing Data Integrity with ALCOA+
alt: Five steps to audit data integrity against ALCOA+ in a GMP audit

items.label: Map the data lifecycle
items.desc: Trace generation, review, reporting and retention per decision

items.label: Risk-rank systems
items.desc: Prioritise systems supporting batch release: CDS, LIMS, QMS

items.label: Interrogate audit trails
items.desc: Confirm enabled, locked and actually reviewed

items.label: Test access controls
items.desc: Verify segregation of duties and no self-granted admin

items.label: Sample for anomalies
items.desc: Orphan data, aborted runs, re-integrations, sequence gaps
